title: QualityMC+
description: Looking for a vanilla+ experience that only enhances the visuals of the game just for you? This pack is for you then!
body:
# QualityMC+
**Made by iShockMC**

**Are you trying to find Quality modpacks that don't add new items/blocks to the game and only visuals/effects? This is the modpack for you!**

QualityMC+ is the perfect modpack for players who love the classic Minecraft experience but want it to look and run better than ever. This lightweight yet powerful pack enhances graphics, lighting, atmosphere, and game performance without changing any of the core gameplay mechanics.

Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, building intricate structures, or simply enjoying the blocky sunset, QualityMC+ ensures your game looks stunning and runs smoothly.

No new items, no new mechanics—just a cleaner, more immersive Minecraft that stays true to the original gameplay.

What are you waiting for? Get to Quality Adventuring!
